caption:
The Ferrari Makes It Even More Aesthetic 🫠
.
.
📹 charles_leclerc & antoine 
.
.
The Scuderia Ferrari star began a new chapter away from the lights of Formula 1. From the streets of Monaco to the grand stages of the world, Leclerc has built his legacy through passion, resilience, and relentless determination. Now, alongside the roar of V6 engines and the pursuit of world championships, he steps into a new journey — one defined by love and commitment.
For Ferrari fans, this feels like watching the “Prince of Scuderia” grow beyond the cockpit. The same focus and loyalty he shows every race weekend are now part of his personal story. While he continues chasing glory in red, today is about something bigger than podiums — it’s about partnership, promises, and a lifetime ahead.
A special moment in the life of one of Formula 1’s brightest stars. ❤️
.
.

And on Youtube on Wednesday, 4th March for our season opener episode. (It’s the longest video we’ve ever made(/making, still working on it).

This marks the first major evolutionary upgrade for our characters since 2020. Excited for a new season! 

#f1 #formula1 #australiangp
